diagrams.title: Cohen-Sutherland Outcode Regions
diagrams.description: 3x3 grid showing 9 regions around clipping rectangle with their corresponding outcodes
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how outcodes are assigned based on position relative to clipping boundaries

diagrams.title: Liang-Barsky Parameter Line
diagrams.description: Number line showing parameter u from 0 to 1 with entry and exit points
elements: u1 marker showing where line enters window
u2 marker showing where line exits window
Clipped portion between u1 and u2
Boundary values shifting u1 and u2

diagrams.title: Sutherland-Hodgman Clipping Process
diagrams.description: Step-by-step polygon being clipped against rectangular boundary
elements: Original polygon with some vertices outside
diagrams.purpose: Visualize sequential clipping of polygon edges

diagrams.title: Line Clipping Comparison
diagrams.description: Comparison of same line being clipped by both Cohen-Sutherland and Liang-Barsky
elements: Original line from outside to outside
Both resulting in same clipped segment
diagrams.purpose: Compare the two main line clipping algorithms
